# UH APEX Contact

## Resource type
APEX contact information.

## Resource summary
Use for contact details: University of Houston APEX Accelerator, 1455 West Loop South, Suite 890, Houston, TX 77027-9530; phone 832-842-8477; email uhapex@central.uh.edu.

## BOSS routing use
Use this when the user's need matches the topic. Ask enough discovery questions to determine readiness before routing to a specialized program.

## Guardrails
Do not guarantee funding, contracts, certifications, export legality, grant awards, loan approval, or technical feasibility. Route to official advisors and professionals.
